note: Auto-extracted from QC PDF via pdf-parse. "raw" preserves verbatim PDF text per case for traceability; refine desc/steps/expected during component automation.

testcases.description: Key TermsVerify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01 Lesson Opener UI and FunctionalityKey TermsVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal. kitaboo.com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Key TermsVerify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02 Lesson Opener FunctionalityKey TermsVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

testcases.description: Key TermsVerify if user is able to start authoring
testcases.expected: Click on start authoringShould redirect to New authoring page
